name: RFdiffusion with Chai verification
description: Run pipeline with RFdiffusion (design protein backbones), ProteinMPNN (design sequences to fold into structure), and Chai (fold final sequences).
capabilities: Run pipeline with RFdiffusion (design protein backbones), ProteinMPNN (design sequences to fold into structure), and Chai (fold final sequences)

pdbFile.description: Input protein structure in PDB format for the RFdiffusion+ProteinMPNN+Chai pipeline

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed binder
